body.zh-TW:
## 方法一：Python 直接寫入 DB（推薦）
```bash
cd D:/Workspace/MemTrace
python scripts/seed_spec_kb.py
```
產生系統使用者 `usr_system01`、工作區 `ws_spec0001`，並 upsert 全部節點與邊。

## 方法二：透過 CLI import
```bash
cd packages/cli && npm run build
npx memtrace import examples/spec-as-kb/nodes
npx memtrace import examples/spec-as-kb/edges/edges.json
```

## 驗證
```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/workspaces/ws_spec0001/nodes | jq length
# 期望：23
```
body.en:
## Method 1: Python direct DB insert (recommended)
```bash
cd /path/to/MemTrace
python scripts/seed_spec_kb.py
```
Creates system user `usr_system01`, workspace `ws_spec0001`, and upserts all nodes and edges.

## Method 2: Via CLI import
```bash
cd packages/cli && npm run build
npx memtrace import examples/spec-as-kb/nodes
npx memtrace import examples/spec-as-kb/edges/edges.json
```

## Verify
```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/workspaces/ws_spec0001/nodes | jq length
# Expected: 23
```
